Complete hardware & software ecosystem

Enterprise-grade hardware solutions

Patented Dual Input Technology

Enables simultaneous customer and cashier interaction on the same screen.

High-performance displays

Interactive 4K touchscreens in multiple sizes for any environment.

Integrated NFC & Camera

Built-in NFC payments and camera-based loyalty scanning at checkout.

Robust Metal Design

Durable hardware built for demanding environments across all platforms.

Enterprise-grade software solutions?

Seamless POS integration

No system changes required. Fast, risk-free deployment..

Scalable modular platform

Over 50 modules tailored to your business needs.

AI-driven fraud detection

Identifies anomalies and strengthens internal control in real time.

CRM & engagement engine

Capture data, boost loyalty, and unlock customer insights.

Real-time business insights

Turn POS data into actionable dashboards.

Customer data enrichment

Capture and complete CRM profiles at checkout.

Performance & KPI tracking

Measure conversion, loyalty, and engagement.

Operational optimization

Identify inefficiencies and reduce costs.
